entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Please continue forward fulfilling all of the scaffolding with real logic that truly turns this into a new age IDE comparable to cursor and github co pilot for vs code / jetbeans and ollama, this is to remain a fully QT and dependant free source using assembly when and where needed to eliminate ANY deps!

Yes the brutal compression is for model streaming/loading to be faster, please ensure these engines are fully capable of being used and engaged and not just stubbed! there is too much time and effort for any of these fully defined kernels aka titans and loaders and engines and streaming engines to not be used!

Add production grade code finishes ensuring enterprise quality final results for the end user!'
